mappings.rationaleAI: Learning and thinking are defining cognitive capacities of humans discussed in this article.
Games are powerful tools for developing cognitive potentials including problem-solving, learning, and creative thinking.
Knowledge acquisition through learning and thinking is fundamental to the development of human cognitive potentials.
Language acquisition and linguistic competence are central to the development of human cognitive and learning potentials.
Cognitive and educational psychology study how humans develop their potentials through learning and thinking.
The mind's cognitive functions of learning, reasoning, and problem-solving are central to human intellectual development.
Education is the systematic process through which individuals develop their potentials for learning and thinking.
Childhood is the primary period for developing learning and thinking capacities.
Play is essential to the development of learning and thinking potentials.
Toys support the development of learning and thinking in children.
Memory is essential to the development of learning and thinking.
Thought is the direct subject of developing learning and thinking potentials.
Intelligence relates to the development of thinking and learning.
Learning is the direct subject of developing a person's potentials.
The brain is the biological substrate for learning and thinking.
AI models aspects of human learning and thinking addressed in this section.
